forbidden_actions: Do not create or modify cron definitions.
Do not mutate Hermes config or live Hermes state.
Do not send data externally or change auth.
Do not start persistent servers or expose the network.
Do not install dependencies, edit lockfiles, or change package manager state.
Do not read or print secrets.

rules: Treat generated JSON as the only app data source.
Classify reusable breakage as repeatable_defect first.
Escalate instead of guessing when doctrine is insufficient.

classification.one_off_judgment: A non-reusable taste or tradeoff disagreement that does not break the contribution contract.
classification.repeatable_defect: A behavior, contract, or verification failure another fresh agent would likely reproduce.
classification.missing_domain_knowledge: A safe decision needs product or Hermes knowledge that is not available in repo-local doctrine.
classification.agent_behavior_failure: An agent ignored instructions, crossed the trust boundary, or skipped required verification.

escalate_if: Existing generated-data checks require mutating live Hermes state.
Deterministic verification cannot run without installs or secrets.
The local-only architecture conflicts with the shared gate or requested change.

commands.description: Refresh the local generated snapshot using the repo's read-only collector.
Refresh briefing cartridges from the generated snapshot.
Fail closed unless generated inputs can build and sanitize the static app bundle.
Run focused gate integration and fail-closed tests.
